problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
